findings.evidence: `roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/OrthogonalL2Bases/Targets.lean:82-83` declares this A1 theorem; `rg hermite_generating_function code/TauCeti` has no hit.
findings.fix: Add the public theorem `hermite_generating_function (x t : ℝ) : ∑' n, aeval x (hermite n) * t ^ n / (n.factorial : ℝ) = Real.exp (x * t - t ^ 2 / 2)` or split this PR so it no longer claims completion of A1.
findings.issue: The public A1 surface omits the roadmap target `hermite_generating_function`.

findings.evidence: `roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/OrthogonalL2Bases/README.md:134-135` lists the one-step recursion as A1 API; the implementation is `private theorem integral_aeval_mul_hermite_succ` at `HermiteGaussian.lean:136`.
findings.fix: Expose `integral_aeval_mul_hermite_succ` under a stable public name, with the same statement or the roadmap's intended shape, and keep only proof-local auxiliaries private.
findings.issue: The one-step weighted-pairing recursion is part of the A1 API but is declared `private`, so consumers cannot use the characteristic integration-by-parts lemma without unfolding/reproving it.

summary: The A1 public API is incomplete: two roadmap-level characteristic lemmas are either absent or kept private, so downstream users cannot import the stated Hermite API without redoing proof work.
